name: codex-mem
description: Local-first hybrid memory search for Codex with SQLite, optional Chroma, and project-group memory.

interface.shortDescription: Hybrid Codex memory with SQLite, Chroma, and merged project groups.
interface.longDescription: Codex Mem builds a local memory system over ~/.codex/sessions, supports fast SQLite retrieval, optional Chroma semantic search, project-group memory merging, and startup context lookup.
defaultPrompt: Search my earlier Codex sessions for how we solved this before.
Show startup context for this working directory before I begin.
Run hybrid memory search to find semantically related past work.
